value:
Dear Hiring Team,

I am excited to apply for the Software Engineer Generative AI ML position at Apple India. With extensive experience in Generative AI and Machine Learning, I have developed innovative solutions that drive impactful results. My background includes designing advanced AI models, optimizing algorithms, and collaborating across diverse teams—aligning well with Apple’s commitment to inclusivity and innovation.

Please find my resume attached for your review. I am eager to bring my skills in Generative AI and ML to Apple and contribute to creating products that serve everyone. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my experience can benefit your team.

Thank you for your consideration. I look forward to scheduling an interview at your convenience.

Best regards,  
Ayush  
Email: [your email]  
Phone: [your phone]  
LinkedIn: [LinkedIn URL]  
GitHub: [GitHub URL]
